Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 290 [loan][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

⸢3⸣ MA.NA 10 GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR qa-⸢lu⸣-u₂

(o 1) 3 minas 10 shekels of refined silver of Tattannu, son of PN, incumbent on Ubar, son of Eriba. From the first day of month Addaru of the 8th year, of (this) month, 10 shekels per mina interest will add to this silver of 3 minas 10 shekels.

o 22

ša₂ mtat-tan-nu ⸢DUMU ša₂ m⸣x-x-[x] ina muḫ-ḫi

o 33

mu₂-bar DUMU ša₂ meri-⸢ba⸣ ul-tu

o 44

U₄ 1en-KAM₂ ša₂ itiŠE ⸢MU⸣ 8-KAM₂ ša₂ ITI

o 55

ina ⸢muḫ⸣-ḫi ma-ne₂-e 10! GIN₂ <<ša₂ BABBAR>> KU₃.BABBAR

o 66

⸢ḫu⸣-bul-lu₄ KU₃.BABBAR a₄ 3 MA.NA! ⸢10 GIN₂!⸣

o 77

ina muḫ-ḫi-šu₂ i-rab-bi1

Reverse
r 1r 1

lu₂mu-kin₇ mdna-na-a—MU DUMU ša₂ mdMUATI—SU

(r 1) Witnesses: Nanaya-iddin, son of Nabu-eriba; Anu-zer-lišir, son of Anu-kaṣir; Anu-ahhe-iddin, son of Šamaš-iddin; Anu-ah-iddin, [son] of Šamaš-eriba; Nabu-bel-..., son of Kiribtu.

r 22

md60—NUMUN—GIŠ DUMU ša₂ md60—⸢KAD₂?⸣

r 33

md60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU ⸢DUMU ša₂⸣ mdUTU—⸢MU?⸣

r 44

md60—ŠEŠ—MU [DUMU] ša₂ mdUTU—SU

r 55

md⸢NA₃?⸣—EN-x ⸢DUMU ša₂⸣ mki-⸢rib⸣-tu₄

(2 lines blank)
r 66

mGI—d60 lu₂UMBISAG ⸢DUMU⸣ [ša₂] ⸢m⸣d60—ŠEŠ—MU UNUGki

(r 6) Mušallim-Anu, the scribe, son of Anu-ah-iddin. At Uruk, the month Šabaṭu, 27th day, 8th year of Darius, king of all the lands.

r 77

⸢iti⸣ZIZ₂ U₄ 27-KAM₂ MU 8-KAM₂

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

[m]⸢da⸣-ar₂-ia-a-muš LUGAL KUR.KUR

Left
l.e. 1l.e. 1

ṣu-pur ša₂ mu₂-bar

(l.e. 1) Nail of Ubar.
